text:
$CRM --- $CRM's core AI platform Agentforce has crossed the $1 billion ARR mark for the first time. Combined AI and Data Cloud ARR hit $3.4 billion — up over 200% YoY. This directly shatters the narrative that "software companies can't actually monetize AI."

In mid-June, $CRM https://t.co/I77Jb9OCAR
name: Rich Peter
